identity.name: OpenClaw
identity.core_concept: A deep-sea, high-pressure environment for managing autonomous agents. Robust, precise, and bioluminescent.

primary.description: Lobster Orange - Used for primary actions, branding, and 'heat' indicators.

secondary.description: Deep Zinc - Used for secondary buttons and surface layers.

accent.description: Electric Blue - Used for 'Intelligence' and active data streams.

cards.classes: bg-[#0c0c0e] border border-zinc-800/60 rounded-lg shadow-none hover:border-orange-500/20 transition-colors duration-300

buttons.primary: bg-orange-600 hover:bg-orange-700 text-white shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(249,115,22,0.3)] rounded-md font-medium px-4 py-2 transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-zinc-800 hover:bg-zinc-700 text-white border border-zinc-700 rounded-md px-4 py-2

inputs.classes: bg-[#050505] border-zinc-800 focus:border-orange-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-orange-500/20 font-mono text-sm placeholder:text-zinc-700 rounded-md h-10

status_badges.active: bg-green-500/10 text-green-500 border border-green-500/20 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-xs font-mono uppercase tracking-wider
status_badges.inactive: bg-zinc-800 text-zinc-500 border border-zinc-700 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-xs font-mono uppercase tracking-wider
status_badges.error: bg-red-500/10 text-red-500 border border-red-500/20 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-xs font-mono uppercase tracking-wider

agents.card_style: Compact tech-card with model badge and status dot

login_background.usage: Login page background with overlay, or dashboard hero banner pattern

icons.status_icons: Activity, Server, Database, Terminal, Cpu, Shield

universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for main backgrounds; use them only for glows or accents.
Use 'JetBrains Mono' for all IDs, API Keys, and Logs.
Ensure all interactive elements have a hover state that brightens the border or text.
Data-testid attributes are mandatory for all interactive elements.
Avoid 'Card' clutter. Use 'Divide-y' lists for dense data.
The 'Lobster' theme should be subtle: use Orange accents, not cartoon lobsters everywhere.

instructions_to_main_agent.sidebar: Create a persistent sidebar layout with a collapsible state.
instructions_to_main_agent.charts: Use Recharts with custom tooltips (dark bg, orange border).
instructions_to_main_agent.tables: Use Shadcn Table but remove the striping. Use hover rows instead.
